description: ENorthern Territory, abashayeli abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana kumele bangabi ne-BAC uma beshayela.
Ngesikhathi sezulu esimanzi, yehlisa isivinini bese ushiya isikhala esengeziwe ngoba amabanga okuma ayakhula futhi imigwaqo ingase ishelele.
Kumelwe wehlise ijubane uye ku-40 km/h uma udlula izimoto eziphuthumayo ezimile ezibonisa izibani ezikhanyayo.
Ungashayeli uma ukukhathala, ukugula, utshwala, izidakamizwa noma imithi kungalimaza ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha.
Ukuskena phambili nokuhlola izibuko njalo kusiza abashayeli ukuthi babone izingozi kusenesikhathi futhi baphendule ngokuphephile.
Vumela indawo eyengeziwe eduze kwezimoto ezisindayo futhi ugweme ukuhamba ezindaweni lapho zingaboni khona.
Imithwalo nama-trailer kumele kuboshwe kahle futhi kuhlale ngaphakathi kwemingcele yokudonsa nesisindo esemthethweni.
Uphawu oluthi CHA U-TURN lusho ukuthi ukwenza i-U-turn kuleyo ndawo akuvunyelwe.
Akufanele upake eduze kakhulu nezindawo zokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, izibani zomgwaqo noma izindawo zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zikuvumela.
Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba abahambi ngezinyawo lapho bewela futhi lapho bephenduka umgwaqo abahambi ngezinyawo bayawela.
Amaphoyisa angenza ukuhlolwa kokuphefumula okungahleliwe, futhi abashayeli kumele balandele lapho beyalwa ukuba banikeze isampula yokuphefumula.
Izindawo zesikole eNyakatho Yesifunda ngokuvamile zisebenza ngesivinini esingamakhilomitha angu-40 ngehora ngezikhathi eziboniswe ezimpawini.
Esibonini sokuma noma emgqeni wokuma, kufanele ume ngokuphelele bese uvumela indlela ngaphambi kokungena empambanweni yemigwaqo.
Khulisa ibanga lakho elilandelayo ezimweni ezimanzi ukuze uvumele isikhathi esengeziwe sokubhuleka futhi unciphise ingozi yokushayisana.
Gwema ukulandela amaloli eduze kakhulu ngoba ukubonakala kwakho kanye nebanga lokuma kwakho kungase kunciphe.
Yehlisa ijubane futhi ulalele imikhawulo yesivinini yesikhashana kanye neziqondiso zethrafikhi ezindaweni zokulungisa umgwaqo.
Imizila yamabhasi igcinelwe izimoto ezivunyelwe ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zibonisa ukuthi ezinye izimoto zingangena.
Izindawo zokulayisha zingasetshenziswa kuphela yizimoto ezigunyaziwe, futhi izinhlawulo zingasebenza uma kusetshenziswe kabi.
